programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Millions were engrossed in the investigation of Peterson's missing wife, Laci, only to find that confident and charismatic Scott was also a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The Alcatraz escape they didn't want you to know about and a modern-day Count of Monte Christo breaks out of Monaco's 17th-century prison.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jim Jones was a cult leader and founder of the People's Temple. Known for his extreme beliefs, Jones is infamous for the mass murder-suicide he led of 909 of his followers in Jonestown, Guyana.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Four bodies – two adults and two children – were found shot in a house in an outer suburb of Canberra. Inside the house was evidence that would not only lead investigators to the killer, but would uncover a secret buried for three years.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The biggest death-row break out in U.S history and the world's first helicopter escape.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The FBI works alongside the NRO to stop a potential spy from selling classified secrets to an enemy nation.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When a young girl’s body is found in a park in the teeming rain, the police had the odds stacked against them.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In 1998, Wollongong, NSW, was gripped with fear following the brutal deaths of shopkeeper David O'Hearn and Lord Mayor Frank Arkell. Was it the work of a serial killer? Would they strike again?

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Escape by a rope made of dental floss and the last man hanged in Australia: the break out that sealed his fate.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: La police enquête lorsqu'un homme disparu depuis trois mois est retrouvé décapité et enfermé dans une poubelle.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When a young police officer pulled over a car for a simple traffic infringement, he never imagined it would turn into a high speed chase.

programme.title: Murdertown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In Portsmouth, we examine two murders, both committed on the 12th December of different years by Allan Grimson, and the possible links to the disappearance of Simon Parkes.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After the hijacking of Egypt Air Flight 648, FBI agents launch an international manhunt.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Forensic Investigators hosted by Lisa McCune, revisits the way in which infamous murders were performed and solved by police.

programme.title: Real Prison Breaks S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: In Britain, IRA terrorists are re-captured after just minutes on the run and in Australia, an inmate loses half his body weight and slips through his cell bar window to freedom.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: One of the most notorious criminals, serial killer Ted Bundy used his good looks to charm his victims. He was executed in 1989 after being convicted of murdering two college women and a young girl.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a candid and exclusive prison interview, the convicted murderer recounts the details of her love affair with a teenage boy that led to the brutal murder of her husband.

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Investigations begin on an undercover sting operation to stop illegal arms.

programme.title: Murder Made Me Famous S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The 1980 murder of Scarsdale diet doctor, Herman Tarnower, shocks the nation. His lover and headmistress of a prestigious girls' school is arrested and convicted in a sensational trial.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After committing two violent murders in Wollongong, NSW, Mark Valera became the youngest offender to be given a life sentence. When he's behind bars his father is brutally killed. But who committed that crime and what was the motive?

programme.title: Declassified S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A Taliban double agent was instrumental in securing the release of foreign nationals held hostage in Afghanistan.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The Melbourne suburb of South Yarra was rocked by a blast in the early hours of November 23, 1986. A car containing a bomb had exploded in the car park below the Turkish Consulate, wrecking the building and damaging shops in the area.

programme.title: Forensic Investigators S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Paul Snabel didn’t return home for over a week in November 1989, his flatmate became concerned and reported him missing.

programme.title: Declassified S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Russian sleeper agents infiltrate the U.S. and begin living normal American lives.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: After a mass genocide is committed during the Bosnian War, the U.S. and NATO go after one of the most notorious war criminals.

programme.title: Declassified S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With the help of an undercover source, the DEA's Special Operation Division launches an international manhunt.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The day of Mark and Lauren G’s big engagement party arrives and the guests are shocked at the scale of it comparing it to an actual wedding.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Joey has a proposition for Mick as he plans to be the face of one of the nights at Sugarhut

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark thinks of a way of taking Arg’s mind off of Lydia so plans a game of tennis doubles with him.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia starts to wonder if Amy is the girl in the rumor who slept with Arg but Debbie assures her otherwise

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With Joey now taking over Essex with his club nights, Mark is determined to get back on the scene and reclaim his title.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Lauren G is infuriated to discover she isn’t invited to Mark’s pool party in case she makes the female guests feel uncomfortable.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Frankie, Lauren Pope and Chloe discuss the highly topical PIP implants. Lauren reveals to the girls she has them. There's a new girl on the block that arrives with attitude and 'history'.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Steve gets an unexpected phone call from Hawk, an old friend from the police force who has recently retired and moved into the Sunny Meadows rest home.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Marine Lt. Hank Thomas enters BBQ Bob's, the favorite lunchtime hangout of the doctors, wielding a gun in his left hand and threatening three other Marines who are already there.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Paraplegic, asthmatic game show contestant Sol Singer climbs into his specially-modified van and sets out to a TV studio where he is bout to compete on the live quiz show "Through the Roof."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Dear friend and famous pop singer Danielle Marsh comes from new York to stay with Mark and Steve while she prepares for a big comeback conecrt.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The murder of a young woman brings Alex into contact with her roommate Amy Saroyan, Alex's former girlfriend whom he has not seen in many years.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: While a deliriously happy Madison helps new love Brett Hayward move in with her, Steve investigates the brutal slaying of palastic surgeon Dr. Yordsberg.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Roger and Lana's marriage is rocky at best. Lana plots for her lover to kill Roger while he is away for the night on business so that she can have all of his money.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While driving, David tells his wife Laura that he wants a divorce. Laura becomes hysterical and begins to cry and hit him. Trying to fight off his wife's attacks, David loses control of the car and flies into an intersection.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jim, the hospital janitor, teaches Dr. Sloan some magic tricks. Jim is a whiz at magic and can nimbly manipulate a medallion between his fingers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: George, a schizophrenic homeless man, shows up on a beach prophesizing about death. The couple in the nearby beach apartment, Cynthia and Ethan, threaten to call the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Steve Sloan is hospitalized for injuries sustained in a high-speed car chase, he wakes in a haze and watches with a blurred vision what looks like another patient being stabbed by one of the medical staff in his room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Nurse Stacy Bradshaw tells Dr. Sloan about her skydiving escapades, and he politely turns down her extreme thrill-seeking invitation to come along.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dr. Travis catches Dr. Sloan in his office, settling in with a bowl of popcorn to watch a reality television show, "Hot House," a "Big Brother" and "Real World" type series.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Mark's friends Stanley and Tammy have decided to preview Tammy's new fashion line at their wedding.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At a spiritual retreat, Beth Scarburough confronts Father Dominick about his failed friendship with her husband, Matt. She pleads for him to make amends with his former friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Cocky medical student, Hunter Koskov, coerces his classmates, Max and Jenny, to experiment with each other by inducing "death."

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Amanda does a guest spot as a nurse on the soap opera, where she serves as a medical consultant. Star actress Thalia faints during a scene and is rushed to the emergency room.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Julia Adams comes to Dr. Sloan for a check-up. She seems a little anxious. At the same time, a man comes running through the hospital and in one highly restricted lab, knocks over and breaks a test tube.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan questions old friend and newspaper baron Barclay about the security company.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Simon Hodiak, a noted cardiologist, is a gambling addict. When his bookie strong-arms him to repay his debt of $60,000, Simon sells his Porsche.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Maureen Tate is ogling over her nephew, Casey, with sister Grace. Maureen panics when there is a knock at the door, and the man's voice declares he is the police.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Old man Oscar Hemmings is being wheeled into surgery. As he is pushed through the halls, he has his lawyer, Mr. Bendix, take the names of doctors and workers in the hallway.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Journalist Ellen Sharp is meeting Phil Gwynn at a nightclub; apparently, he has a big scoop for her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 18
programme.desc: While Amanda Bentley visits Martin, a good friend, and benefactor of a visiting Communist Chinese dance troupe, Tako, the star dancer drops dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: High-power and high-profile defense attorney, Roger Calendar, is brought into the emergency room with a near-fatal stabbing wound.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 20
programme.desc: As Lt. Steve Sloan and his partner, Cheryl, pick up their favorite strawberry milkshakes, Steve is distracted by a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Calvin Laird, Mark and Steve's neighbor, threatens his girlfriend violently when she challenges his mean behavior. His repeated playing of loud music bothers the Sloans to no end.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Wooldoor makes a bovine friend in Live Action Forest as Toot heads to a reunion with Xandir.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mark and Randall teach a sexed up robot self-control, and Callie mixes up Mark in a demonic ritual.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: A Lilliputian arsonist escapes Mark's custody and finds an unlikely hiding place in Twayne's nose.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: Daria's class is caught in a snowstorm while on a field trip to the mountains, and Jake and Helen try to reignite intimacy in their relationship.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The roommates move into their new home, and hot tub drinks lead to a racial breakthrough make-out.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Daria is approached by two imaginary friends to get Christmas, Halloween, and Guy Fawkes Day to return to Holiday Island, and Helen and Jake get struck by Cupid's arrow.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After Lawndale's cyber cafe is robbed, Mr. O'Neill convinces Daria, Jane and the other students to raise funds to reopen the coffeehouse.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Renwaldo sends Stimpleton on a food mission to trade their last chigger for some cheese. Stimpy meets a village idiot and trades his chigger for the magical golden singing cheeses.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Captain Hero delves into his origins, while the housemates go into suicide business.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Brittany and Kevin get into a heated fight, Sandi baits Quinn into organizing the school dance, and Jodie gives Brittany relationship advice.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mark and Randall spend Halloween with Callie's family, and Leonard tries to find people to live in a haunted house.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: Jane tries to raise money by selling artwork, Trent has a hard time delegating, and the Fashion Club seeks legal counsel.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Randall tries to make a quick buck on the Soul Exchange by selling off Mark's immortal soul.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Stimpy gets paranoid because he's used up eight of his lives and only has one left to live. Ren and Stimpy begin a job working for the Reverend Jack Cheese in his meat mobile.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mark hooks up with an old girlfriend to test his open relationship.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Ren dreams that he is a brave outlaw who robs from the rich and Stimpy is a damsel in distress. When Ren gets sick, Stimpy acts as nurse and dedicates himself to curing his friend.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Captain Hero confronts a big fear after a drunk driving accident, and Ling Ling locates his inner monster.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The housemates compete in musical performance in order to stay in the Drawn Together house.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Therapy unearths a repressed memory from Foxxy's past. Xandir gives Toot a makeover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: Daria and Jane team up with different partners on an economics project after new tensions over Tom put a rift between them.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 512
programme.desc: Rumors swirl at Lawndale High when Tom accidentally spends the night at Daria's house, Jake faces a medical issue, and Daria considers taking her relationship to a new level.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: While babysitting for a family of well-behaved but sheltered children, Daria enlists Jane to help her broaden the kids' horizons.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A spelling bee forces Foxxy to confront her champion past. Clara becomes addicted to car crashes.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After Daria and Jane try to dissuade Ms. Li from allowing a modeling agency to scout for talent at Lawndale High, Quinn gets recruited to take modeling classes.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Captain Hero's x-ray vision makes a housemate ill. Distraught, he seeks to give up his super powers.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 413
programme.desc: Tensions between Jane and Daria come to a head when Daria realizes that her feelings for Tom might be more complex than she'd ever expected.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Daria gets into a verbal altercation with a former Lawndale football player who returns to the school to have a goal post named after him.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ling-Ling enters foster care, and Captain Hero time travels in order to play a prank on his past self.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Ms. Barch assigns lab partners for a behavioral science project, Daria is paired with disinterested jock Kevin, and Brittany is paired with the sleazy Upchuck.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Wilbur Cobb tells a campfire story about Galoot Wranglers. Ren goes crazy and is sent to a home. Here we see the whole cast of the Ren & Stimpy show has gone nuts.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The roommates take on Entertainment Weekly after a bad review. Captain Hero explores homosexuality.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Callie must care for her younger, hotter demon sister, who happens to be engaged to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Trent agrees to help Jane and Daria on their multimedia project, and Daria feels threatened when Jane falls for a guy named Tom.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: Lawndale's reputation takes a major hit when an injured Kevin leaves the football team after a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: While working on the school yearbook, Daria takes a liking to a formerly homeschooled student with many eccentricities.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Stimpy begins to prepare dinner for Ren when he falls in love with the main course, a chicken. Powdered Toastman tries to bring the president to Little Jimmy, but his warp speed burns him to a crisp.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: The residents of Lawndale are drawn to a new big box store that caters to their various needs, where Daria and Jane look for gummi bears for an art project.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Trent asks Daria for help finding a birthday gift for Jane, the two find themselves at a piercing parlor and Quinn and Helen team up for a fashion show.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After being drafted into Satan's dark army, Twayne and Mark must do their patriotic duty and end the world.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Randall's new arm lands him on the DOI's intramural football team, and Callie pimps out Leonard.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Stimpy's nose goblin, Frank Snotra, becomes famous. However when he's ready to perform, he gets stage fright. The side kick union is going on a massive strike and Stimpy is alerted.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: When Helen takes the family on a trip to look good for her boss, they find themselves subjected to intense psychotherapy to unearth their problems.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: When a kitchen fire does damage to the Morgendorffer home, the family goes to an expensive hotel while Daria stays with Jane and Trent at their house.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 11

programme.title: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues.

programme.title: The Rules
programme.desc: Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides it_s time for his officers to get back on track.

programme.title: Every Man
programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.title: I Never
programme.desc: When a child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal.

programme.desc: After months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick - then Andy - go missing.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex-convict.

programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz.

programme.title: Skeletons
programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bunny receives a ring from her fan club in her home town. In the ring she sees the faces of people from her hometown telling her she's needed there so she returns home.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: In a future where everyone must undergo an operation at the age of 19 to make them identical to everyone else, one woman desperately tries to hang onto her own identity.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are told that they are to create designs that epitomize the Marie Claire woman.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers get their Unconventional Materials Challenge: to make chic looks out of party supplies.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers must design garments influenced by the hats of famed British milliner Philip Treacy.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers are split into teams to create a cohesive line to match the hair trends for 2010.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers prove that former bridesmaids dresses can be worn again after redesigning the looks.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Project Runway sets sail when the designers get a resort wear challenge from Michael Kors.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers learn about the creation and longevity of American sportswear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers create a high fashion look with one of the biggest rewards in Project Runway history.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers create their own fabric & garment to correspond with a memorable time in their lives.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers get an opportunity to create a look for the launch of Heidi Klum's own ready-to-wear line.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The final 5 designers get treated to a night of luxury in a penthouse suite for making it this far.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Tim Gunn visits hometowns of the four remaining designers, but only three will show as finalists.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the finale, one designer is named the winner of Project Runway Season 8.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: 20 designers must go in front of judges to explain why they deserve one of the 16 spots this season.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The Unconventional Materials Challenge lives up to its name when designers arrive at a pet store.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are broken into teams of two to create larger-than-life designs for stilt walkers!

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are in for a tough challenge when it is revealed that Nina Garcia is their client!

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are instructed to put on New Balance clothing sets to hear about the latest challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers become students when they are partnered with kids from Harlem School of the Arts.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: With the use of an HP Touchsmart, designers will work in teams of 5 to create a cohesive collection.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: When Heidi introduces nine men on the runway, the designers are stunned.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are treated to a special performance from their new client: an up-and-coming band.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The 70's will serve as inspiration for this week's Piperlime.com Challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Exotic birds serve as the inspiration for this week's L'Oreal Challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The judges challenge the designers to each create a mini-collection.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Tim Gunn travels to the finalists’ homes to check in on their progress before they head back to NYC.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The 32 hopeful contestants arrived in a Pasadena hotel to start a runway challenge. Tyra selected the 13 finalists to enter the competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After the models battle it out to make the final cut, they are shocked to learn they will be going bald.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the girls are transformed with makeovers, they are put on ice at a photoshoot and face an ice princess back at the house.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Creepy cockroaches and falling fairy tales test the competitors' limits on the catwalk and in their photoshoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The models experience a time for all seasons in a photoshoot after getting tips from supermodel Janice Dickinson

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The models' improvisational skills are tested in a Covergirl commercial, and one lucky girl wins a guest-starring role on Veronica Mars.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: One model shocks everyone when she loses her temper with another competitor; and at a photoshoot, the girls must model shoes while krumping.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: One model faces a surgical procedure, and the models pose in a black and white photo directed by Tyra Banks.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The participants are taught how to handle challenging interview questions and after a trip overseas the models must pose upside down as mermaids.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Never-before-seen footage.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: One model is suddenly rushed to the emergency room and the girls must post on top of an elephant.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The final four models travel to Phuket for their Go-Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The final three models walk the runway through an ancient city in order to become AMERICA'S NEXT TOP MODEL.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Top model hopefuls strut their stuff to make it to the final 14. strut their stuff to make it to the final 14.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The participants move into their new Los Angeles home, two competitors complain during their dramatic makeovers and all of the girls must pose topless.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A model passes out and is rushed to the hospital and the competitors learn how to strut their stuff on the runway.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: One model’s photo is deemed the worst in the show’s history, and the participants work with a hard-nosed photographer.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When one participant contracts a contagious skin condition, the other models fear for their safety and skin.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S4 Ep. 6

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a tough week those that remain in the Top 50 have one last challenge to prove their worth. Each contestant has a box of ten mystery ingredients including pork, chocolate, bread and cabbage and just 30 minutes to prepare a judge worthy dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arriving in Sydney, the contestants are taken to their luxury $16M pad and immediately into the MasterChef kitchen. Put straight to task, the Top 20 are given a set of ingredients and have just one hour to whip up a chicken dish of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Fresh from the first challenge win, one contestant gets the opportunity to compete against a celebrity chef. Both Chef's make the same dish and the judges will blind taste each. If the contestant makes a 'better' dish, they will fastrack to the finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tonight, both teams are challenged to run their own Sushi train, serving real paying customers. They are responsible for everything, from creating the delicate dishes, to drumming up business and making sure their respective patrons are happy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The losing team from last night's challenge must deliberate on their weakest member. Assessing each other's performances during challenges and judging each other on teamwork, the contestants must decide who will be the first to leave MasterChef Australia.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Resident judges Gary Mehigan and George Calombaris give the contestants a chance to learn from the best and see how it's really done in the weekly Masterclass.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The 19 remaining contestants receive a shock announcement from one of their number that reinforces the pressure they are all under in their bid to win. Missing home, one contestant has decided to abandon his restaurant dream and return home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Apple tarte tatin is the order of the day as the three bottom chef's from last night compete in a frantic cook-off to stay in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Tonight, the Executive Chef of Longrain Restaurant in Sydney competes against one contestant in creating a Thai salad. After the judges have blind tasted each dish, should the MasterChef contestant be picked as the winner, a place in the final awaits.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Taken to the exclusive Sydney Vaucluse Yacht club, the contestants are divided into two teams and told they have $500 to plan, make, and serve a banquet for ten people.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The losing team from the Off Site challenge must select which member must leave. With just an hour to talk through their decision it looks like the team leader might become the fall guy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Friday night is Master Class night, and George and Gary are cooking up a storm. They revisit the week's challenges, and offer their take on how the contestants might have faired better. The tips fly fast and furious as the experts reveal their secrets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Tonight, the competitors face two back to back challenges. First, the mystery box, in which all have just half an hour to create a spectacular dish from unknown ingredients. Then, the winner decides upon a Chinese style for the invention challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The three weakest performers from last night cook off to stay in the competition. Each must cook the same dish - stuffed squid. None have cooked such an intricate dish before, and are soon buckling under the pressure.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Tonight, the winner of Sunday night's Invention Challenge gets a chance to advance through to the final week of the competition with tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge. But standing in the way is chef, television presenter and restaurateur, Peter Evans.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Tonight the competitors are divided into red & blue teams, led by Gary and George. They head to the supermarket to choose ingredients for a 3-course meal, but the catch is: each team is only allowed to shop from 3 randomly assigned supermarket aisles

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: It's the toughest night of the week for the competitors. While the winning team from last night's challenge enjoy an Asian cooking course, the losers must now decide which of their number will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The competitors get their weekly chance to watch some of the best chefs in the country prepare dishes. Tonight, Frank Shek from leading restaurant China Doll gives a lesson in Chinese cuisine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Tonight's Mystery Box tests the contender's seafood skills. They've got just half an hour to create their dish using a whole snapper, chilli, eggs & beer. Chris decides his best bet is to drink the beer, while Tom tests his skills with an Asian dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Each of the bottom three from last night's challenge must cook sticky date pudding with butterscotch sauce. It's a restaurant favourite, but given its simplicity, the judges will notice even the tiniest flaw. Who will be judged the weakest?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In tonight's Celebrity Chef Challenge, the contestant must produce a better gnocchi than Alex Herbert, from the famed Bird Cow Fish restaurant in Sydney.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 27
programme.desc: The group divides into red and blue teams, for a challenge at Sydney's Royal Easter Show. Each has $750 to buy ingredients at the Fresh Food Dome, and must cook up dishes to entice the passing crowd to buy their food.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Team elimination is the toughest night of the week for competitors in the losing team. They must decide which of their team mates deserves to be sent home. Friendships are tested and emotions stretched, never more so than tonight.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 29
programme.desc: The contestants get their weekly fix of cooking class from Gary and George. On the menu this time, how to cook snapper using a paper bag, and the perfect steak.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 30
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box contestants must create their own designer cupcakes, and the designs are indeed unique as Chris decides beer is the magic secret ingredient that will get him over the line.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 31
programme.desc: The contestants are given the recipe, and all the ingredients they need to cook a paella. For cooks of this calibre, it shouldn't be a problem. But add a 45 minute time limit, and the stress of knowing they are cooking for their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The winner of Sunday night's invention challenge gets the opportunity to cook against legendary Australian chef Guy Grossi.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 33
programme.desc: They say it's important for a chef to understand their produce, & today the contestants get to know fish. Divided into two teams & on a strict time limit, they're sent out into the rough seas beyond Sydney Heads, where they'll catch the fish to cook with.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 34
programme.desc: It's the worst night of the week for the contestants, with the losing team having to vote a person out of MasterChef Australia for good. Will the team captain go down with the losing ship?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S1 Ep. 35
programme.desc: It's the cook's night off, as Chefs Gary and George take over the kitchen to reveal their cooking tips. This week, Lobster Bisque and Cupcakes are on the menu.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A shock display of power at the last Tribal Council places an immediate target on one castaway. Will the new shift in camp dynamics be enough to remove a prolific player from the game?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A scheming conversation is overheard putting one contestant in the firing line and an alliance is shattered resulting in one of the most divided Tribal Councils this series.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Another alliance is in jeopardy as one contestant decides to flip on a fellow tribesman, planning the biggest blindside this season, but an unexpected turn of events forces the castaway to reconsider.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The battle for individual immunity is at an all-time high and contestants must compete in a fast-paced memory challenge to secure their safety for another day going into Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: With alliances crumbling and paranoia setting in all six castaways are determined to win individual immunity. In an explosive Tribal Council, one contestant holds the power but who will they choose?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: After seven weeks on the island of Samoa, only five contestants remain in the race towards winning Australian Survivor 2017 and $500,000 in prize money. Who will become the next member of the Jury?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After 50 testing days on the island of Samoa, the final four contestants go into the challenge not for immunity but for an advantage to eliminate a member of the jury at tribal council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: The final four start to plan and collude on who they will vote off next at Tribal Council however this is Survivor and anybody could win immunity.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: With only 3 castaways left remaining, who will win the half a million dollar prize and the title of sole survivor?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Following the exciting winner reveal to crown Australian Survivor champion for 2017, the 24 castaways reunite for an explosive reunion special hosted by Jonathan LaPaglia.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Married NHS workers, Will and Kathryn, are the first team to take on the never-ending money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Zee and his dad, Tony, return to take on the Limitless money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 3
