programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Yes, it's time to 'get on it like a car bonnet'! Series 2 kicks off with two feisty new housemates joining the house... but will it be a warm welcome or a frosty reception? (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte is pushed to breaking point as lothario Gaz continues to pull anything in a skirt. Rebecca's feistiness intensifies as she faces competition to win one of the boy's affections... (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: There's no time to mourn Charlotte's departure as Vicky and Ricci's nocturnal spooning is interrupted by an unexpected visitor. Meanwhile, Gary and James are quick to get their kit off! (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: James continues his lucky streak with the ladies. Unlucky in love Sophie is played for a mug. Gary persuades Charlotte to return... but has she managed to get over him as she had hoped? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: The 'cheer us all up' party ends in carnage as Charlotte tries to move on and the boys exchange blows. Vicky and Ricci make their relationship official with jaw dropping consequences... (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Ricci and Gary rock the house, leaving Vicky and Charlotte stunned. Meanwhile, the girls set off on a road trip tackling a colonic, Geordie Style, and it all ends in tears before bedtime! (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The honeymoon period is over as Vicky and Ricci split. Rebecca reveals her secret party trick, much to Jay's delight, whilst Gary comes clean with Charlotte. It's pure mental like! (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the gang's time in the house, and hardly any relationships are left intact. Vicky and Ricci move on, Sophie gets dumped and Jay leaves a bad taste in Rebecca's mouth. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 250
programme.desc: The Reunion brings the cast and their friends & families together to find out what really went down during series 2. Host Russell Kane will rummage through the tensions, passions, laughter and tears.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: It's time to swap the grey river Tyne for the crystal blue waters of Cancun, Mexico for the carnage of Spring break! Vicky and Ricci are loved up, whilst Jay is missing the love of his life. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: It's the final few days of spring break and the house is rocked by the loss of yet another member. In the last hours, to the disbelief of everyone, Ricci plans his proposal to Vicky. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: The gang throw Ricci and Vicky an engagement party to remember. There'll be booze and banter aplenty, but it turns into a night that everyone will remember for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With Ricci and Sophie having been asked to leave the house, the rest of the Geordie Shore gang decide a road trip to Liverpool is in order to check out the clubs and talent.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore house is a far from happy place with Vicky and Sophie still not talking and the rest of the house caught in the divide... it's stormy seas ahead at the Shore.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: Peace has finally been restored in the house now that Vicky and Sophie have made up, but nothing lasts forever and when Ricci sees red on a family night out, disaster strikes.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: With Ricci gone from the Geordie Shore house, the rest of the gang are determined to keep Vicky's spirits up and the boys decide that what better way than a walk on the wild side - camping!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: It's all coming to an end in the house with some keener to leave than others. Before they pack their bags, there's time for a big bash, Geordie style, and it seems like love is all around.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore gang are back in a pimped up pad and ready to cause chaos once again. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: The gang return from Amsterdam and it's time to tear Newcastle a new one. Vicky and Ricci celebrate breaking the Geordie Shore relationship curse and the gang try out speed dating. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: There's tension in the Toon, as James brings girlfriend Kate on a night out, leaving Holly unimpressed. The Geordie Shore house explodes as Vicky and Ricci have a row to remember. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: Jenni learns the extent of her injury. Mike considers taking things with Paula to the next level. Deena holds Meatball Auditions and ends up rolling out of the sauce pan and into the fire. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: Jenni wonders where she stands with Roger and realises they might be in more trouble than she thought. Mike decides it is time for him to take his relationship with Paula to the next level. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Mike adjusts to being in a relationship and gets confused about the rules. Deena goes back to her meatball ways, but has to fight for her right to party. (S6, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: Sammi confronts Deena about her meatball antics and the two of them go head-to-head. Mike and the roommates get to know Paula's wild side, and Mike isn't sure he can handle it. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 609
programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 610
programme.desc: MVP is back, resulting in a near threesome for Vinny. The girls struggle to keep the baby shower a surprise for Nicole, and Vinny is nervous about Jionni seeing him at the party. (S6, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 613
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 614
programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Jersey Shore kicks off when eight soon-to-be roommates move into a summer share. Romance heats up in the house and the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Feeling like an outcast, Snooki tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. The roommates' first club night out gets flirty. Mike and Sammy's situation turns into a love triangle. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: The love triangle gets even more intense when Ronnie catches Sammy giving her number to another guy. And a housemate chooses to leave the Shore for good. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Pauly and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: The roommates head to Atlantic City where fun turns to fury when Mike manages to antagonise both Snooki and JWOWW. And one roommate reveals that she used to have an eating disorder. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Open Air Stereo gives the performance of a lifetime and Rocky and Tessa snuggle up with old boyfriends.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: It's graduation time and the seniors are getting ready to head to college, while the remaining juniors start to think about their senior year.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Charlotte hears news on social media that brings back painful memories. Focussing on the future, she turns her attention to new man Josh and trying to fix her relationship with BFF Melissa. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Charlotte heads out to Australia with BFF Melissa. With the rules agreed, Charlotte is confident she can trust Josh while she's away, but on a night out she makes a terrible mistake. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Charlotte's keen to put last week's drunken mistake behind her, but will Josh forgive her for locking lips with someone else? Meanwhile, Charlotte plans a surprise party for her Dad's 50th. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Charlotte tries to take her relationship with Josh to the next level by meeting his friends, but her world is sent into a spin when she finds out that her ex Stephen is back in the UK. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Charlotte decides it's time to introduce Josh to her parents, but when Josh takes back a heartfelt message it leaves her questioning the relationship. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Charlotte's week turns bad when her ex starts posting messages about her on social media, and it gets worse when a blazing row with Josh looks to have ended their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Things are looking rocky between Charlotte and Josh. Will Josh finally ask Charlotte to be his girlfriend, or will he leave her with no choice but to end their relationship for good? (S1, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Charlotte attends the premiere for The Charlotte Show and hosts a party to celebrate. But when Josh sees a clip of her with another boy in Australia it brings back bad memories. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Jose Mas, CEO of MasTec, one of the largest builders of telecommunication and energy systems in North America, receives an explosive surprise while heading down a manhole.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Mitchell B. Modell, CEO of Modell's Sporting Goods, gets some major league advice from New York Yankee's pitcher CC Sabathia before beginning his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Ron Lynch, President of Tilted Kilt, a Celtic-themed sports bar and restaurant, goes undercover in his own company, he discovers one Kilt Girl crossing the line with customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As our youngest boss featured in the series at age 34, Kat Cole, President of Cinnabon, Inc. discovers a couple of employees who share her zealous work ethic.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Stephen J. Cloobeck, Chairman and CEO of Diamond Resorts International obtains a new chain of resort properties, he goes on an undercover mission for a second time.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum, CEO and Co-Founder of PostNet, the fastest-growing design, printing, copying and shipping franchise, dons a drastic disguise for his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lorne Abony, CEO and Chairman of Mood Media, faces his fear of heights when he has to climb a tall ladder to install equipment during his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Jim Rogers, Chairman and CEO of Kampgrounds of America Inc., the world's largest system of family friendly franchised and company-owned campgrounds, faces his fears when he must zip line while undercover at a KOA site.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Paul Damico, President of Moe's Southwest Grill, has to bite his tongue after realizing one of his restaurant supervisors is being pushy and rude to the line workers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Sara Bittorf, the Chief Brand Officer of Boston Market, joins UNDERCOVER BOSS for the first time, when she makes the crucial decision to terminate an employee who makes disparaging remarks about customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Toby Bost, CEO of O'Neill Clothing, USA, one of the largest surf wear and active lifestyle brands, is put in a difficult position when an employee's casual attitude crosses the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Andy Wirth, President, and CEO of Squaw Valley and Alpine Meadows, two ski resorts located in Lake Tahoe, ventures to the top of an unsafe cliff to post warning signs while training with a ski patrol.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Fatburger, a “fast casual” restaurant famous for their made-to-order burgers, takes drastic measures when he learns that employees at one franchise location are facing payroll issues and working with broken equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Tony Wells, Chief Marketing and Customer Officer for The ADT Corporation, a leading provider of home security, struggles to sell their services to a recently robbed neighborhood bar.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When Eric Casaburi, the CEO of Retro Fitness, a full-service fitness center that is franchised, discovers an employee who hates customers and fails to follow directions leading to one of the biggest reveals ever on Undercover Boss.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John Wilson, President, and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins, Inc., the parent company for Orkin, North America's largest pest control provider, cleans up a major cockroach infestation and tackles swarming bees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most intriguing employees who have appeared on the show and how the experience impacted their life.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: This special episode of Undercover Boss features updates on some of the most compelling bosses and how the undercover experience impacted them personally as well as the companies they lead.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Boss of Twin Peaks goes undercover in his restaurant chain famous for scantily clad wait staff. An employee's crude language with customers throws the boss off guard. Former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks returns to the show with a darker side.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In a series first, an openly gay boss goes undercover! Can the boss measure up while manning the floor in the lingerie department? The Boss is hot under the collar when an employee continues to bad mouth his company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 3

programme.desc: In the clinic tonight, Dr Christian looks after a man who can't get an erection, while Dr Pixie helps a teenager embark on astonishing facial surgery to finish correcting her cleft lip and palate.

programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 55
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 94
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, a serial killer stalked lone victims in the dead of night, his hunting ground the suburbs of Washington, D.C., his target, anyone who owned a car.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 53
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 105
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 110
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: An Arizona girl's 1984 kidnapping leads the FBI on the trail of a key suspect.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 14

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Surveillance video is often the most precise witness to a crime. After three brutal murders were caught on tape in Alabama, the suspects fled the area. They had an arsenal of stolen weapons, and swore they wouldn't be taken alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 79
programme.desc: When a paramilitary faction used bombs and robbery to further their cause, they crossed the line. The well-organized terror cell was difficult to define, and even harder to stop.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 87
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 25

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 89
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 75
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 76
programme.desc: When a bank teller arrived at her parent's home the gunmen were already there. The robbers held her family hostage and forced her to empty a bank vault. If she didn't comply she could lose everyone she loved.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 93
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 20

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 25

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 19

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can’t refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla has it all figured out, a thriving career and a loving fiance. She co-hosts Wake Up Chicago with Derek. Sparks begin to fly between them when they become the unexpected guardians of a baby.

programme.title: 10 Truths About Love
programme.desc: Hannah, a romance columnist, thinks she's got life and love figured out until her boyfriend unexpectedly breaks up with her. Her editor hires a new writer to collaborate on her column and sparks fly.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show.

programme.title: A Match in Manhattan
programme.desc: When Celeste loses her job as a teacher, her boss puts her forward for an au pair job with a NY Property Tycoon. As she struggles with the children, can Celeste win over Richard and his children so she can keep her job, or maybe love has other plans...

programme.title: Calling for Love
programme.desc: Podcast host Samantha has an aversion to romance but is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. She then falls for charming Jake, who calls in with a problem she is determined to solve.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a rooftop garden with an old-school country boy to appease her boss's new passion for 'green' living and secure her promotion. But love may be in bloom.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: When Ariel sees her dream man, she will stop at nothing to get to know him better. In her quest to see him again, she meets restaurateur Daniel, who shows her that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: When a scattered marketing exec is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around, she finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: When Jim's daughter is kidnapped, he must lead a band of killers to retrieve their share of a heist score.

programme.title: Attack on the Queen
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers must put their long-standing feud behind them in order to stop a group of terrorists.

programme.title: Unstable
programme.desc: After a woman finds a man she thinks to be her soul mate, strange things start to happen in her life.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Alan is a cutter, someone who edits over people's recorded histories. His latest assignment puts him in danger

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Five years after her husband was killed in a car accident, Linda has picked up the pieces and moved on.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment II
programme.desc: The sole survivor of a wartime experiment is sent 41 years into the future and must race to save the world.

programme.title: Good Morning, Killer
programme.desc: An FBI agent begins to notice a pattern in a kidnapping case. A new lead leaves her questioning her theory.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Lock, Stock & Two Smoking Barrels
programme.desc: When four criminals lose a rigged poker game against a kingpin, he gives them one week to settle their debt.

programme.title: Death Proof
programme.desc: A group of women are stalked by a scarred stuntman who uses his "death proof" cars for his deadly plans.

programme.title: Planet Terror
programme.desc: After a bio-weapon turns thousands into zombies, it's up to a rag-tag group of survivors to stop the infected.

programme.title: Child 44
programme.desc: A pro-Stalin officer investigates a series of child murders, even when Russia denies the existence of a killer

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Leah and her genies are trapped in a cave, it's up to their friends Zac and Kaz to save the day. When the girls bake magical flying cookies, Zeta and Nazboo sneak into their palace to steal the flying flour.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Leah notices Zac the Magician's magic tricks aren't going well, so she calls on her genies for some real magic assistance. But Shimmer and Shine aren't getting the tricks right either, and the girls have a magical mess to fix!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When the Great Animal Crown is lost at the bottom of the ocean, Blaze transforms into a super-fast shark to retrieve it for his Animal Island friends. But he’ll have to swim fast – or Crusher may get to the crown first.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are at the beach when they find a little lost mermaid who needs to get back to her mommy at Mermaid Cove. Together the 3 set off on an underwater adventure!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 611
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are heading to the Bike Shop to pick up Boots' very first bike today.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A light thief (Melissa Rauch) is on the loose, leaving all of Axle City in the dark! Gabby outfits Blaze with special lights to help him track down the light thief and restore the missing lights.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Leah and Zac are excited to watch their favorite movie, but Leah's popcorn burns and the movie won't play. Leah asks Shimmer and Shine for some movie magic help, but they accidentally wish the movie to life!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: It’s race day, and Crusher is cheating twice as hard to beat Blaze and Watts - sending both drivers far, far away! But Blaze and Watts are determined to save AJ and Gabby and get back to the race in time to win!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Shimmer and Zahrora accidentally cause some trouble when they visit a new part of Zahramay Skies called Zahraconia. The girls meet Shaya's twin brother Shaun and help them when their magic combines to form a powerful Lightning Burst Cloud.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Zeta traps the girls in a magic bubble, Tala, Nahal and Parisa team up with the girls' Zahracorns to free them. Shimmer, Shine and Leah meet Rubi, a Rainbow Genie-In-Training, whose rainbows quickly get out of control.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take a rainbow butterfly, Mariposa, to the Butterfly Ball where everybody gets to have wings.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Zeta accidentally transports Tala the monkey to her lair, the girls set out to rescue her. The girls meet a real life ice genie! But when Zeta steals her ice gem necklace, it's up to the girls to stop her.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Andy at the Umi City Airport is on the plane with his family and can't wait to go on his first trip to the beach. But the plane can't take off, and everything is going wrong!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Join Dora for a Father's Day adventure! When the Little Kite she makes for Papi gets blown away in the wind, she'll need your help before she goes out over the ocean!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Crusher’s Grammy is in town to watch Crusher and Blaze race at the Monster Dome. But when Crusher tries to cheat using rocket skis, his plan backfires, blasting him off the racetrack and across Axle City! Part 1

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Blaze discovers an exciting new sport called Truckball. But when Crusher and his team of cronies challenge him, Blaze must scour all of Axle City to put together a Truckball team before the big game.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Leah has invited Shimmer and Shine over for a sleepover party, where they'll eat pizza, dance all night, and sleep in a pillow fort! But when all the party plans go awry, the genies help Leah out with some wish granting.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: An enchanted treasure map leads Shimmer, Shine, Leah, and their Dragon Rider friend Farnaz to the powerful Dragon Gem. But when Zeta gets ahold of the gem, it's up to Farnaz and the girls to get it back before Zeta becomes too powerful to stop.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 217
programme.desc: The Great UmiCar Rescue: UmiCar is more than just a car; he's a hero and an important member of Team Umizoomi. So when UmiCar gets stranded on an iceberg, the team act fast to save their friend!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: Boots really wants to give his mommy a picture of himself for her birthday, but he's having a really bad hair day! Dora and Boots set out on a Hairy Quest: Boots is ready for his close-up!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Nazboo's siblings come to visit, Zeta recruits them to help take the girls' gems when they're not home. / When Zac wishes himself into the forest to find a mythical creature, Kaz and the girls adventure to find him.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When flight magic disappears from Zahramay Skies, Rubi and the girls try to set things right, using rainbows to get around. When Zeta combines Daydream Dust with Dream Come True Dust, genies' daydreams start coming true and wreaking havoc.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Zeta uses a magical gem to shrink everything in Zahramay Falls, including Leah, Shimmer, and Shine! Leah, Zac, Zeta, and the genies compete in the most fun sport in Zahramay Falls: Zoomicorn Toss.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Zeta traps the girls in an ancient temple where they must work together to escape. Zac, Kaz, and the girls explore a mysterious tower and find a necklace that can turn you into a monster.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his friends compete in the most epic race in history: the Race to the Top of the World! But when Crusher throws them off course, Blaze and his Monster Machine friends persevere to finish the race. Part 1

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dora and Boots discover Pincel, a cute little paintbrush who's lost and really wants to get back to Painter Daniella at the Art Studio.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 119
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and someone is calling from far away... It's Santa Claus! Santa's Toy-Making Machine is broken - it's not making any toys! Can the team save Christmas?

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Zeta's upset when Nazboo abandons her on their special day, unaware that it's because he's planning a surprise party for her! When Nazboo loses one of his baby teeth, Zeta schemes to get a powerful present out of it from the Tooth Flitter.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Crusher builds a super-powered vacuum to clean up his big mess – but the machine goes haywire, sucking up Crusher and everything in its path! Now Pickle must team up with Blaze and AJ to stop the vacuum and save Crusher.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Shimmer, Shine and Leah go to a new place called Zahramay Oceanea to help train a young genie-in-training named Arabella. But when Zeta shows up and tries to take over Oceanea, it's up to the girls and their new friend to stop her.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Kayla's fun at the water playground stops when the elephant water sprinkler stops working! To help, Team Umizoomi need to know how water gets to Umi City, so they can fix it!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The girls celebrate Cuddle Buddy Day by helping the Animal Genie deliver pets. But when Zeta uses a spell to make everything dark, the Animal Genie must team up with the Glitter Genie to make the pets glow so they can see.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Dora takes a Magic Cape back to the Prince's Castle so she can break the spell that turned the Prince into a lion.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dora and Diego in the Time of Dinosaurs: Dora and Diego travel back to prehistoric times and go on a dinosaur adventure to find Baby Jaguar and bring him home to his birthday party.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Dora, Boots and Diego set out to rescue their bunny, turtle and butterfly animalito friends and bring them back home to their Copal Tree.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Stripes loves his jungle horn, a special instrument that can summon all the animals in the jungle. But when a jealous Crusher steals it, Blaze and Stripes must speed after him in a wild chase to get it back.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Dora and Isa have been learning how the Earth's natural energy can power things we use every day. So they've made a volcano for the Science Fair!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine discover a magical gem that makes two of everything, including Zeta! Zac wishes for a pet Ziffilon for Kaz, which turns out to be more trouble and fun than they were expecting.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are going on vacation with Diego and Baby Jaguar at the Rainforest Campground. They're packing everything they need, especially Baby Jaguar's favorite, the Dora Snacks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dora's Rainforest Talent Show: It's time for the Rainforest Talent Show, but first Dora and Boots have to rescue Benny so he can tell his jokes in the show.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The girls join Zora, the Pirate Genie, on an adventure to find a magical Rainbow Pearl to power her ship. / Zeta takes a crystal with random wishes inside it and uses her magic to make it grant the wishes for her.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls meet a genie with the power to change hairstyles, but Zeta's determined to take the power for herself. / The girls travel to a magic garden, where they meet a Flitter Genie and shrink down to her size to explore.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Trick or Treasure: The girls visit Nila the mermaid for an underwater treasure hunt. Easy as Pie: Zeta uses a potion to make Zac do everything she says. Can Kaz and the girls stop Zeta before it's too late?

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Zeta traps Samira in a magical cave, the girls seek the help of Samira's mentor. The girls accidentally create a fun, sticky glob of candy who's curious about everything.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 120
programme.desc: Mill, Geo, and Bot reward themselves for cleaning up Umi Headquarters with a trip to the playground. But a storm has left the sandbox, swings, slide, and bouncy bridge in disarray!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Milli is visiting her friend Emily's class for Favourite Things Day, the day everyone brings in their favourite things to show the whole class. Emily has some sparkly shells.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When the girls bake a cake with bouncing flour, it bounces off and they must catch it in time for Roya's Feather Day party! A potion spill turns Rocket's barks magical. But when the magic gets out of control, the kids must find a way to stop it.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Zeta and Zac get trapped inside a magic bottle and must find a way out before all their friends get sucked inside too! Zeta tries to stop the kids from finding her secret lair when she sees them hunting for gems in the area.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Dora and Boots hop on Pegaso, the flying horse constellation, for a high-flying adventure to bring home his constellation friends to the Moon before the Sun rises!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dora and Boots take Baby Bongo on a musical adventure as they race to the Big Music Show in time for Baby Bongo's first performance.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby join Pegwheel the Pirate-Truck for an island treasure hunt! Following their treasure map, the friends search jungle beaches and mountains to find where X marks the spot.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dora's Royal Rescue: Dora and Boots and the noble horse, Rocinante, are off to Story Castle to rescue Don Quixote from the evil wizard, Malambruno.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The girls are in for some fun and adventure when a pirate genie accidentally lands on their doorstep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Spongebob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip to be replaced by Le Spatula./Mr. Krabs sends Spongebob down a wishing well to collect the coins dropped in by people making wishes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 74
programme.desc: Spongebob has never had a vacation. To save his job, Mr.Krabs gives him the day off! /Spongebob finds an old powdered wig in the trash and wears it thinking it's cool.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: When Squidward swallows his clarinet reed Sandy offers to retrieve the piece./A misunderstanding over an advertisement causes Patrick to think he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 76
programme.desc: After a bike accident, Squidward is coated in so much mud that the residents of Bikini Bottom think he is a monster./ SpongeBob tries to impress Squidward with his new magic kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 77
programme.desc: SpongeBob has failed his driving test - again. Pat is so outraged that he takes the test to prove that it is unfair, only he passes!/ Patrick discovers in a genealogy document that he is next in line to receive a kingly title!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 78
programme.desc: SpongeBob hears that a ferocious biker gang is coming to town, so SpongeBob prepares to protect the town all by himself./A new Kelp Smoothy chain is opening up all over Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: SpongeBob's favorite jellyfishing net is missing! And worst of all, Pat may have been the one that stole it./Rejected yet again by Squidward, SpongeBob decides that if he can't hang with the real Squid, he'll make his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 80
programme.desc: SpongeBob is going to have the best day ever. But when work, karate, jellyfishing, and Squidward's clarinet recital don't go as planned will his day be ruined?/ It's Best Friends Day so Patrick and SpongeBob trade presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 81
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for longer than anyone can remember. But one day, Mr. Krabs reveals that they were not always this way. There was a time when the two rivals were best friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's old fry cook pays a special visit to the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob is in awe of his predecessor, who has since become a world-renowned chef./Tales of the boogeyman send SpongeBob into a panic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 83
programme.desc: We check on Patrick's morning routine in 'Rise and Shine', SpongeBob must be patient for his cereal-based entertainment in 'Waiting', and then in 'Fungus Among Us', SpongeBob develops a case of Ick!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 84
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is determined to uncover Plankton's next devious plot in 'Spy Buddies', we learn advanced boating techniques in 'Boat Smarts', and Mr Krabs holds a competition in 'Good Old Whatshisname'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 85
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab (so that he'll never be late again) in 'New Digs', and then in 'Krabs A La Mode', Plankton has an idea to cause some chilly trouble for Mr Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 86
programme.desc: A scary roller coaster opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park in 'Roller Cowards', then in 'Bucket Sweet Bucket', Plankton tricks SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward into fixing up the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 87
programme.desc: SpongeBob has trouble saying goodbye to the most perfect Krabby Patty he has ever cooked up in 'To Love A Patty', and then in 'Breath of Fresh Squidward', Squidward becomes the most jovial Squid ever!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wishes he could talk to money in 'Money Talks', and then in 'SpongeBob vs the Patty Gadget', SpongeBob battles a patty-making machine. Plus there's a dance contest in 'Slimy Dancing'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 89
programme.desc: A food critic gives SpongeBob high praise, and Mr Krabs takes advantage in 'The Krusty Sponge'. Then in 'Sing A Song Of Patrick', SpongeBob helps Patrick get his song some airplay on the radio.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 90
programme.desc: Sandy's Tree Dome has a flea problem in 'A Flea In Her Dome'. Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's donut and feels guilty in 'Donut of Shame', and SpongeBob is washing dishes in 'The Krusty Plate'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Plankton turns everyone into babies in 'Goo Goo Gas', and then in 'Le Big Switch', SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef at a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 93
programme.desc: SpongeBob must stay clean for 'Picture Day' in boating school, Patrick eats for free in 'Pat No Pay', and then in 'Blackjack', SpongeBob must stand up to his nefarious cousin Blackjack.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 94
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally punches himself and gets a black eye in 'Blackened Sponge', while in 'Mermaid Man vs. SpongeBob', Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are brainwashed by Plankton!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 95
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick board a ship of prisoners going to jail in 'The Inmates Of Summer', and then in 'To Save A Squirrel', SpongeBob and Patrick stow away on one of Sandy's wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 96
programme.desc: Pest Of The West: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 97
programme.desc: It's a battle of the restaurants in '20,000 Patties Under The Sea', and then in 'The Battle Of Bikini Bottom', Patrick and SpongeBob discover that they have very different views about cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 98
programme.desc: WhoBob WhatPants?: SpongeBob gets a bump on the bonce and can't remember who he is. His friends back in Bikini Bottom, who once told him to get lost, soon find they're missing him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 99
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally messes up Squidward's face in 'The Two Faces Of Squidward', and then in 'Spongehenge', SpongeBob's sponge brings all the jellyfish to the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Plankton replaces the Chum Bucket with a Roman coliseum (and togas!) in 'Spongicus', and then in 'Suctioncup Symphony', Squidward is sure to win a music contest - if SpongeBob and Patrick stay quiet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 104
programme.desc: When Squidward points out that SpongeBob is 'Not Normal', he resolves to change his ways. And then in 'Gone', SpongeBob wakes up to discover that everyone in Bikini Bottom is... gone!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 105
programme.desc: SpongeBob is injured at work in 'The Splinter', while in 'Slide Whistle Stooges', SpongeBob and Patrick are driving Squidward crazy with their new slide whistles.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Patrick decides it's time to start living life like Larry the Lobster in 'A Life In A Day', and then in 'Sun Bleached', SpongeBob tries to get a tan, with disappointing results.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Squidward becomes monstrously huge, which only pleases SpongeBob and Patrick, in 'Giant Squidward', and in 'No Nose Knows', Patrick notices that he has no nose. How does he smell? He doesn't. Yet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The Krabby Patty's secret ingredient is stolen and SpongeBob must find it in 'The Patty Caper', and then in 'Plankton's Regular', Plankton is surprised to have a regular customer who enjoys his food.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Squidward gets busted for speeding in his boat (which isn't a speedboat) and is sent back to boating school in 'Boating Buddies'. Then in 'The Krabby Kronicle', Mr Krabs sets up his own newspaper.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 110
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is messing up Pearl's preparations in 'The Slumber Party', and then in 'Grooming Gary', SpongeBob gives Gary a makeover, so that he can enter him in a pet show. But Gary's not so keen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 111
programme.desc: SpongeBob And The Big Wave: Our heroes find themselves stranded on a tropical island, inhabited by an enigmatic surfing guru named Jack Kahuna Laguna. Guest starring the voice of Johnny Depp.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 112
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes the richest Sponge in Bikini Bottom in 'Porous Pockets', and in 'Choir Boys', Squidward tries to avoid SpongeBob while on his way to an audition for the Bikini Bottom Men's Chorus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Mr Krabs enters the world of professional wrestling in 'Krusty Krushers', and then in 'The Card', SpongeBob is determined to get a super rare Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy trading card.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 114
programme.desc: SpongeBob is determined to find out everything there is to know about Vikings in 'Dear Vikings', and then in 'Ditchin', Patrick persuades SpongeBob to ditch class, but fun soon turns to guilt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Mr Krabs must pretend to be a pirate for a visiting relative in 'Grandpappy The Pirate', and in 'Cephalopod Lodge', SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally get Squidward expelled from a secret society.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 116
programme.desc: In 'Squidward's Visit', SpongeBob is desperate to have Squidward visit him at home, but Squidward says no, and the store is all out of square pants in 'To Squarepants or Not To Squarepants',

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 117

programme.desc: Trip beats a gaming legend, landing him a sponsorship deal with a big company. When the deal turns out to be a nightmare, Dub and the kids must help out.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Big Time Bonus: Gustavo gives the guys a bonus for their hard work, but they quickly begin to make bad decisions with their money.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 110
programme.desc: You Bet Your Bunny: The Game Shakers host a tournament to promote a new Sky Whale update. Double G bets Bunny, thinking Babe will beat one of her classmates. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: In order to finish their new dance game on time, The Game Shakers have to wear a motion capture suit and dance their way through the next 48 hours.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When the Premiere Movie Theater plays host to an actual movie premiere, Josh must act as personal assistant to the film's high maintenance child star.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Megan's been extremely secretive and Drake and Josh investigate to find out what she's up to.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A teen magazine runs a “Win a Date with BTR” contest, and the 4 lucky winning girls – each with their own baggage – give the guys serious dating drama.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Drake is unable to break up with his inappropriately laughing girlfriend because she is the daughter of his teacher who has threatened him with summer school.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake and Josh meet the "Great" Henry Doheny, one of the greatest magicians ever - who has fallen on tough times.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Double G has scared Triple G every Halloween since he was a baby. This year he asks Babe and Kenzie to help, but they double-cross him by telling Trip!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Kenzie is torn whether to tell on Dub after she sees him tear down his own statue.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: The girls go to Utah to rescue Trip after Dub sends Trip to Captive Meadows - a center for boys with bad behavior.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Josh befriends Drake's doppelganger, a classmate named Drew, and Drake becomes jealous, fearing that Josh is trying to replace him.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When Dub's brother shows up at Game Shakers and invites everyone except Dub to his wedding, the kids convince him to bring his brother into the fold, promising to make Dub behave himself at the event.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers are kicked out of Fooders to make room for a guest who has his photo on the wall, Babe is determined to get their own photo up using any means necessary. Game Component: "Spitty Llama" (App)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh find out Megan have adopted a pet sheep, they want nothing to do with it.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Big Time Rush has just dropped their second album and the guys get interviewed on an entertainment tonight-type program where they answer revealing questions about their life inside and outside of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Babe is upset to learn that Mason Kendal is moving, so Kenzie designs her a virtual reality version of Mason. Babe loves it, but gets a little too swept up in the experience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Kenzie is hypnotized into being very, very hungry after the Game Shakers take her to see a hypnotist for her birthday.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 316
programme.desc: Dub recommends Kenzie see an eccentric pet plastic surgeon in order to fix her cat's loud nose holes. Meanwhile, Trip tries to get Hudson into a Boy Band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The Palm Woods school is having it's annual Prom and Carlos, James, Logan and Kendall are all determined to win the prom king title, doing whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the guys prepare for their first band photo, which could land them into all the teen magazines.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's been three months since the boys of Big Time Rush moved to Hollywood to record their demos. Now its now up to Griffin to decides the future of the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: In an attempt to seal a promotional partnership with Clam Jumper, the Game Shakers try to hack a billboard and live-stream their new game.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake and Josh compete in a contest where a new Plasma Screen TV is the grand prize but refuse to include Megan who turns out to to be their toughest competition.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Babe tries to plan the perfect date when she finds out that Henry Hart is coming to New York to visit her.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After meeting Susan, Drake's new girlfriend, Josh becomes convinced that her flirtation is more than friendly behavior.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo help Carlos find a date, and Logan flirts with a new girl while still confused about his feelings for Camille. James wants to help Katie get closer to her new crush, but becomes like an overprotective father.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Tiny Pickles: Babe and Kenzie's new game is ready, but Dub promises the world another game based on a crazy dream he had. The kids make his game and it's terrible. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Kendall and Jo confront the future of their relationship when she lands her dream role in a movie blockbuster that will film overseas for the next three years.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 121
programme.desc: Buck the Magic Rat: Kenzie saves a rat in the subway and the kids are grossed out. But it starts bringing them luck and they all use it to solve their problems. (S1, ep 21)

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 318
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie's school project tops the gaming charts as an online sensation! Rapper Double G finds out they used his song and comes to collect his share. Despite their differences, the group teams up to create Game Shakers!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: The Game Shakers have to figure out how to break the news to Dub that they broke his expensive new television.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Griffin films the guys' lives for a reality show.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A classroom competition to make the Palm Woods more environmentally-friendly turns disastrous.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 123
programme.desc: When Hudson releases false information about a secret level in a game, Game Shakers is besieged by angry, crazy fans. Babe goes on a date with Mason Kendal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 215
programme.desc: The Game Shakers set Hudson up with a let's play account to help promote their games, but things quickly get out of hand when Hudson puts on Dub's rocket boots for fun.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo tells them they have to stay in LA to record a three-song Christmas EP, and it looks like they'll be spending their first Christmas away from home.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: After Josh ruins Drake's chances at having a hit song in the Superbowl, the boys must find a way to make things right. Along for the ride are a crazy houseguest, a bride, and one really big shrimp.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Gustavo has to go away on business, he lets the guys house-sit his mansion. While the boys do their best to keep the house in pristine condition, they inevitably destroy everything inside that Gustavo values.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Its date night at the Palm Woods. James helps Carlos on his date with one of the Jennifers, Kendall joins Lucy’s dinner with her parents, and Logan takes a blind date out so he can spy on Camille's date with Jett.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Dirty Blob: After Trip accidentally destroys a copy of the Game Shakers' latest game, the kids must sneak into Dub's studio to retrieve a copy of the game from his tablet. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Party Crashers: Babe and Kenzie's plans to hang with cool guy Mason are ruined when Bunny and Ruthless crash a birthday party. Dub uses Hudson to make Trip jealous. (S1, ep 12)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Trip Steals the Jet: Feeling pressure to fit in with Trip's rich friends, Babe convinces Trip to 'borrow' Dub's jet for the night. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kendall, James, Logan and Carlos are hockey playing best friends from Minnesota, whose lives are turned upside down after mega-record producer discovers them and moves them to Los Angeles to make them into the next big boy band.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The whole gang has gathered at Drake and Josh's house before Drake's big concert, but thanks to Walter's poor weather predictions they end up stuck in the house due to severe rain.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When a video of Babe dancing to Dub's new music video goes viral, Dub challenges Babe to a dance battle to prove he's the better dancer.
